# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import "reflect-metadata";
import express, { Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";
import { createConnection, getRepository, Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, Index } from "typeorm";

type SortDir = "ASC" | "DESC";

@Entity({ name: "products" })
@Index(["sku"], { unique: true })
class Product {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id!: number;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 255 })
  name!: string;

  @Column({ type: "text", nullable: true })
  description!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 64 })
  sku!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 128 })
  brand!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 64 })
  category!: string;

  @Column({ type: "numeric", precision: 12, scale: 2 })
  price!: string;

  @Column({ type: "int" })
  stock!: number;

  @Column({ type: "float", default: 0 })
  rating!: number;

  @Column({ type: "boolean", default: true })
  active!: boolean;

  @Column({ type: "timestamp", default: () => "now()" })
  created_at!: Date;

  @Column({ type: "timestamp", default: () => "now()" })
  updated_at!: Date;
}

function toStringArray(v: unknown): string[] {
  if (v == null) return [];
  if (Array.isArray(v)) return v.flatMap((x) => String(x).split(",")).map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  return String(v).split(",").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
}

function toNumber(v: unknown): number | undefined {
  if (v == null || v === "") return undefined;
  const n = Number(v);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : undefined;
}

function toBoolean(v: unknown): boolean | undefined {
  if (v == null || v === "") return undefined;
  const s = String(v).toLowerCase().trim();
  if (["true", "1", "yes", "y", "on"].includes(s)) return true;
  if (["false", "0", "no", "n", "off"].includes(s)) return false;
  return undefined;
}

function clamp(n: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, n));
}

function escapeSqlStringLiteral(v: string): string {
  return v.replace(/'/g, "''");
}

function escapeLikePattern(v: string): string {
  return v.replace(/\\/g, "\\\\").replace(/%/g, "\\%").replace(/_/g, "\\_");
}

function safeIdentifier(allowed: Set<string>, value: unknown, fallback: string): string {
  const v = String(value ?? "").trim();
  if (allowed.has(v)) return v;
  return fallback;
}

function safeSortDir(value: unknown, fallback: SortDir = "ASC"): SortDir {
  const v = String(value ?? "").trim().toUpperCase();
  return v === "DESC" ? "DESC" : v === "ASC" ? "ASC" : fallback;
}

function buildInList(values: string[]): string {
  return values.map((v) => `'${escapeSqlStringLiteral(v)}'`).join(", ");
}

function buildSearchWhereClause(q: any): { whereSql: string; limit: number; offset: number; orderBy: string } {
  const where: string[] = [];

  const active = toBoolean(q.active);
  if (active !== undefined) where.push(`p.active = ${active ? "TRUE" : "FALSE"}`);

  const ids = toStringArray(q.ids).map((x) => Number(x)).filter((n) => Number.isInteger(n) && n > 0);
  if (ids.length) where.push(`p.id IN (${ids.join(", ")})`);

  const skus = toStringArray(q.skus);
  if (skus.length) where.push(`p.sku IN (${buildInList(skus)})`);

  const brands = toStringArray(q.brand || q.brands);
  if (brands.length) where.push(`p.brand IN (${buildInList(brands)})`);

  const categories = toStringArray(q.category || q.categories);
  if (categories.length) where.push(`p.category IN (${buildInList(categories)})`);

  const minPrice = toNumber(q.minPrice);
  if (minPrice !== undefined) where.push(`p.price >= ${minPrice}`);

  const maxPrice = toNumber(q.maxPrice);
  if (maxPrice !== undefined) where.push(`p.price <= ${maxPrice}`);

  const minRating = toNumber(q.minRating);
  if (minRating !== undefined) where.push(`p.rating >= ${minRating}`);

  const inStock = toBoolean(q.inStock);
  if (inStock !== undefined) where.push(inStock ? `p.stock > 0` : `p.stock <= 0`);

  const minStock = toNumber(q.minStock);
  if (minStock !== undefined) where.push(`p.stock >= ${Math.floor(minStock)}`);

  const maxStock = toNumber(q.maxStock);
  if (maxStock !== undefined) where.push(`p.stock <= ${Math.floor(maxStock)}`);

  const createdAfter = q.createdAfter ? new Date(String(q.createdAfter)) : undefined;
  if (createdAfter && !isNaN(createdAfter.getTime())) where.push(`p.created_at >= '${escapeSqlStringLiteral(createdAfter.toISOString())}'`);

  const createdBefore = q.createdBefore ? new Date(String(q.createdBefore)) : undefined;
  if (createdBefore && !isNaN(createdBefore.getTime())) where.push(`p.created_at <= '${escapeSqlStringLiteral(createdBefore.toISOString())}'`);

  const search = (q.q ?? q.search ?? "").toString().trim();
  if (search) {
    const term = escapeLikePattern(search);
    const like = `'%${term}%'`;
    where.push(`(
      p.name ILIKE ${like} ESCAPE '\\'
      OR p.description ILIKE ${like} ESCAPE '\\'
      OR p.sku ILIKE ${like} ESCAPE '\\'
      OR p.brand ILIKE ${like} ESCAPE '\\'
      OR p.category ILIKE ${like} ESCAPE '\\'
    )`);
  }

  const whereSql = where.length ? `WHERE ${where.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  const allowedSort = new Set([
    "id",
    "name",
    "price",
    "rating",
    "stock",
    "created_at",
    "updated_at",
    "brand",
    "category",
    "sku",
  ]);

  const sortBy = safeIdentifier(allowedSort, q.sortBy, "created_at");
  const sortDir = safeSortDir(q.sortDir, "DESC");

  const orderBy = `ORDER BY p.${sortBy} ${sortDir}, p.id ASC`;

  const limit = clamp(toNumber(q.limit) ?? 24, 1, 200);
  const page = clamp(toNumber(q.page) ?? 1, 1, 1_000_000);
  const offset = (page - 1) * limit;

  return { whereSql, limit, offset, orderBy };
}

async function main() {
  await createConnection({
    type: "postgres",
    host: process.env.DB_HOST ?? "localhost",
    port: Number(process.env.DB_PORT ?? 5432),
    username: process.env.DB_USER ?? "postgres",
    password: process.env.DB_PASS ?? "postgres",
    database: process.env.DB_NAME ?? "ecommerce",
    entities: [Product],
    synchronize: false,
    logging: false,
  });

  const app = express();
  app.use(express.json());

  app.get("/api/products/search", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
    try {
      const { whereSql, limit, offset, orderBy } = buildSearchWhereClause(req.query);

      const selectSql = `
        SELECT
          p.id,
          p.name,
          p.description,
          p.sku,
          p.brand,
          p.category,
          p.price,
          p.stock,
          p.rating,
          p.active,
          p.created_at,
          p.updated_at
        FROM products p
        ${whereSql}
        ${orderBy}
        LIMIT ${limit}
        OFFSET ${offset}
      `.trim();

      const countSql = `
        SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total
        FROM products p
        ${whereSql}
      `.trim();

      const repo = getRepository(Product);
      const [items, countRows] = await Promise.all([repo.query(selectSql), repo.query(countSql)]);
      const total = Number(countRows?.[0]?.total ?? 0);

      res.json({
        meta: {
          total,
          limit,
          offset,
        },
        items,
      });
    } catch (err) {
      next(err);
    }
  });

  app.use((err: any, _req: Request, res: Response, _next: NextFunction) => {
    const status = typeof err?.status === "number" ? err.status : 500;
    res.status(status).json({
      error: {
        message: err?.message ?? "Internal Server Error",
      },
    });
  });

  const port = Number(process.env.PORT ?? 3000);
  app.listen(port, () => {
    // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
    console.log(`API listening on :${port}`);
  });
}

main().catch((e) => {
  // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
  console.error(e);
  process.exit(1);
});
